features.description: Master feature key. The EAV substrate + host trait resolution. On every tier because every sport-aware module (athlete-enrollment, progress, performance) depends on it.
Medium+. Tenants can define custom AttributeDefinitions beyond the seeded platform defaults. Small tier uses seeded defaults only (curated per business_type).
Medium+. Tenants can compose their own AttributeSets from custom + seeded definitions. Small tier uses platform-default sets per sport_key.
Medium+. Tenants can explicitly version breaking changes to sets. Small tier: breaking changes force new set (no version chain).
Enterprise. Tenant admin can nominate attributes for projection into generated columns / search index for fast list filtering. Small/Medium: filter on typed columns only.
